papers.title: Ultrasensitive MoTe2 Circular Polarization Detectors with Monolithically Integrated Liquid Crystal Bifocal Lens
papers.authorsHtml: Qiao, J., Song, S., Wang, Z., Jiang, Y., Sun, J., Liu, C., ... & Yuan, X.
papers.abstract: Recent advances in polarization-sensitive photodetection have highlighted the growing importance of circular polarization discrimination in emerging optoelectronic applications. We report a novel integrated photodetector system that combines a liquid crystal bifocal lens with two-dimensional MoTe2 to achieve the high-sensitivity detection of circularly polarized light (CPL) without conventional optical components.

papers.title: Numerical simulation and remote measurement of temperature-dependent surface acoustic wave velocity by laser ultrasonics
papers.authorsHtml: Qiao, J., Feng, F., Huo, D., Sun, J., & Somekh, M
papers.abstract: Nondestructive evaluation using surface acoustic waves (SAWs) has garnered significant interest for applications in crystallization and material detection. In this study, we explore the temperature-dependent velocities of SAWs in nickel-based superalloys both numerically and experimentally, utilizing a laser ultrasonic technique. This study advances laser ultrasonics by introducing a nonlinear FEM model that couples thermoelastic effects with temperature-dependent material properties, validated experimentally with a resolution of 1 K in simulations.

papers.title: 高温超导薄膜临界电流密度检测装置及方法
papers.authorsHtml: 乔杰，方宵，张学莹，孙家俊
